source_name: Code4rena Reserve Protocol Invitational Findings and Analysis Report (2023-07)
finding_title: Lack of protection when caling CusdcV3Wrapper._withdraw
summary: When unwrapping the wComet to its rebasing comet, users with an equivalent amount of wComet invoking CusdcV3Wrapper._withdraw at around the same time could end up having different percentage gains because comet is not linearly rebasing.
root_cause: CusdcV3Wrapper withdrawal lacks protection around the external Comet withdraw path, exposing users to integration failure or unsafe redemption conditions
broken_invariants: wrapper withdrawals must validate external protocol state before moving user shares or assets
Comet integration failures must not leave users with inconsistent wrapper accounting
principal exits from wrappers need explicit protection separate from reward logic
attack_preconditions: the affected Reserve collateral/plugin/wrapper is deployed or configured in an RToken basket
the report-described oracle, reward, wrapper, or integration edge case is reachable in the audited code version
attacker_capability: external user, trader, or protocol participant able to trigger the affected pricing/trading/reward/withdrawal flow
trigger_actions: execute or wait for the report-described state transition
observe mispricing, reward misallocation, fund lock, or availability failure

impact.description: When unwrapping the wComet to its rebasing comet, users with an equivalent amount of wComet invoking CusdcV3Wrapper._withdraw at around the same time could end up having different percentage gains because comet is not linearly rebasing.

why_not_higher: final C4 severity is Medium; impact, preconditions, or scope are bounded relative to High
why_not_lower: included as a validated High/Medium C4 finding with concrete affected code paths and impact narrative
common_false_positive_angles: verify the exact collateral plugin/wrapper is in scope and configured
check whether oracle freshness, decimals, or external integration assumptions differ in the current target
confirm the issue affects value movement, redemption availability, or reward ownership rather than a harmless view mismatch
mitigations: Consider implementing slippage protection on CusdcV3Wrapper._withdraw so that users could opt for the minimum amount of comet to receive or the maximum amount of wComet to burn. ### Assessed type Timing
